form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 62-day let-up. First-up after four months ran last of 12 at Colac 0 - 62 on February 6 over 2000m, 12 len behind Kingsford with 60kg at $61. Previously second-up won by a long-neck at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw October 16 over 2000m in soft going defeating Immortal Rose carrying 59.5kg at $12. Progressive type and can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run came from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track Mdn-Sw March 13 over 1862m defeating Butterscotch with 59kg at $6. Before that made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Werribee Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1618m, 1.75 len behind Mickidabeel carrying 59kg at $18. Off the mark last time and looks hard to beat again.
